reasoning: The prospect of MrBeast acquiring TikTok emerged in early 2025 as part of an investor consortium bidding for the app ahead of a looming US ban. However, after the April 2025 deadline passed, there have been no credible reports of an acquisition agreement involving MrBeast being finalized or nearing completion. ByteDance has repeatedly indicated an unwillingness to sell the platform with its algorithm intact to American buyers. Reflecting this, the Polymarket probability for this event dropped to 1% by June 12, 2025. Given the lack of any subsequent reporting to suggest a deal has been resurrected and the proximity of the late June deadline, the probability of an official agreement before July is extremely low.
